entity_types.name: KOL
entity_types.description: Key Opinion Leader with large follower base and influence on social platforms

attributes.name: full_name

attributes.description: Quantified influence metric (e.g., follower count, engagement rate)

attributes.name: stance_bias
attributes.description: Numerical stance polarity (-1.0 to +1.0) representing ideological leaning

entity_types.name: Citizen
entity_types.description: Ordinary individual social media user participating in discourse as a non-professional actor

attributes.name: affiliation_cluster
attributes.description: Assigned group label based on behavioral clustering (e.g., 'Group_A', 'Urban_Youth')

attributes.name: moderation_policy

entity_types.description: Any natural person not covered by more specific entity types; used for generic or unclassified in...

attributes.name: formation_context

edge_types.name: FOLLOWS
edge_types.description: Directed social attention relationship (A follows B)

edge_types.name: REPOSTS
edge_types.description: Content amplification action (A shares B's post)

edge_types.name: DEBATES
edge_types.description: Public disagreement or argumentative exchange between entities

edge_types.name: REPRESNTS
edge_types.description: Formal or de facto representation of a group or constituency

edge_types.name: MODERATES
edge_types.description: Content governance action taken by platform operator

analysis_summary: 文档描述了一个用于模拟社交媒体舆论演化的轻量级多模态引擎，核心聚焦于真实主体间的互动建模。实体设计围绕‘谁在发声’展开：KOL、普通网民（Citizen）、自动化账号（BotAccount）构成舆论场基本行动单元；媒体、政府、高校、NGO、平台方作为权威/组织化发声主体；最后以Person和Organization作为兜底类型覆盖长尾角色。关系类型全部基于社媒原生行为（关注、转发、辩论、代表、发布声明、内容审核），确保图谱可驱动仿真运行。
simulation_requirement: 用 README 内容做一次最小舆论模拟图谱构建测试
